content.en:
Time flies.

Another long time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's ultimate particle clone gradually fused together, and it was not far from a complete and perfect fusion.

A certain moment.

Ye Tian's martial arts ultimate particle completely turned into a particle, and this particle was like the origin particle of the ultimate rule.

And Ye Tian's body gradually evolved from this particle origin, and finally turned into the most perfect ultimate body in this world.

Rumble!!!!

The endless energy was absorbed by him, and he even opened his hands and grabbed into the Ultimate Rule Origin, instinctively absorbing countless Ultimate Rule Origin Energy.

The Ultimate Rule Origin is like a boundless ocean, and he is just absorbing a drop of seawater, which has no impact on the Ultimate Rule Origin~.

Every minute and every second, his breath skyrocketed.

I don't know how long it has taken for Ye Tian's transformation to really be completed.

At this moment, he was already an Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

Whether it is physical strength or ultimate will, it is far beyond before, and at this moment, he can easily kill his past self in seconds.

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

"Congratulations to the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

One by one, the projections of the ultimate supreme appeared and came to congratulate Ye Tian.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian hugged his fists.

"Hahahaha, Wanfa Jizun, you stabilize the realm first, and after you completely stabilize the realm, let's talk about it. "

It is the Doomsday Exaltation who speaks.

"Good!"

Ye Tian replied.

And at this time, the sea of dimensions began to transform, and the endless source of ultimate rules poured into the sea of dimensions, with the territory of the human race as the center, constantly influencing the entire sea of dimensions, and making the sea of dimensions leapfrog and upgrade.

Ye Tian knew what the reason was, he broke through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, the Sea of Dimensions was gifted by the Ultimate Rule Origin, and now he was going to upgrade to the Ultimate Heaven and Earth, a Heaven and Earth similar to the Ultimate Heaven and Earth.

Of course, the Sea of Dimensions must not be as high as the Ultimate Heaven and Earth, after all, there are many Ultimate Extreme Venerables born there.

However, if the Sea of Dimensions develops for countless years, there are too many Ancient-level Ultimate Realm Masters and Eternal Ultimate Realm Masters, it will gradually affect the Sea of Dimensions, and there will inevitably be an Ultimate Tribulation similar to the Ultimate Land.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't need to worry about this problem, with his protection, there would definitely be no problem with the human race.

Now.

Since the Sea of Dimensions was evolving, countless cultivators' cultivation had made breakthroughs.

And a large number of treasures have been born in many places, which contain many opportunities and help people to comprehend the ultimate rules.

"You seize this opportunity to cultivate. "

Ye Tian transmitted the voice to the Ultimate Realm Lords of the Human Race.

Suddenly, they immediately carried out retreat and penance cultivation in the newly born treasure lands of the human race, and their strength skyrocketed.

Ye Tian is also in the stable cultivation realm, and at the same time, he is also understanding his body.

"The ability to copy the body of the talent, you can't copy the body of the ultimate supreme!"

Ye Tian discovered this serious problem, he tried to copy his body, but he didn't move for a long time, but he could copy the body of the Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord.

"The grade of the copy talent is low, and it is impossible to copy the body of the ultimate supreme being, unless the copy talent is upgraded again!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, he has already broken through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and he can differentiate a large number of Ultimate Particle Clones in a year, each of which is stronger than the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord, and under normal circumstances, he does not need the Ultimate Extreme Extreme Realm Replica Body.

He was going to let the copy body of the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord level hit the Ultimate Extreme Venerable for the second time to see if this method could break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, but he found that he had failed.

When he was finally the second ultimate supreme, there was no bottleneck at all, and he didn't have the ability to continue to break through.

Because there is only one ultimate supreme supreme in the ultimate path of ten thousand laws, there is no way for his body to continue to break through.

But he still continued to study the Crystal of Aromu, and after breaking through to the ultimate supreme, he spied on the Crystal of Arrow, and learned more things, and at the same time, he also more clearly perceived a terrifying existence related to the Crystal of Arrow.

However, even if he broke through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, he still felt that that one was very terrifying, and he didn't dare to investigate deeply.

Of course, he was still able to continue to refine his Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao with the help of the Arrow's Mother's Crystal, creating more Ultimate Arcanes, and he could also use it to evade the detection of him by other Ultimate Masters.

Another period of time later.

The human race has given birth to more Ultimate Realm Lords, and six Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters have been born, Ye Xingchen's strength has skyrocketed, and the Ultimate Rule Realm has soared.

These are all the benefits brought by the transformation and evolution of the Dimension Sea.

Meanwhile.

A large number of Ultimate Realm Masters knew that the transformation of the Dimension Sea was related to the breakthrough of the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerables to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and they were very grateful in their hearts, but they were also even more in awe of the human race.

......

"I broke through!"

Mitian Jizun was very excited.

He never expected that he would comprehend the ultimate rule one day, and successfully break through to the ancient level Ultimate Realm Master, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

And it all came down to a treasure land born after the transformation of the Dimensional Sea, which allowed him to successfully comprehend the ultimate rule.

It's not just him, in the years that follow, there will be demonic Ultimate Realm Masters who will break through to Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters.

The Sea of Dimensions ushered in an era of incomparably prosperous cultivation, but the competition was also more intense, and a large number of treasures were slaughtered and looted by many Ultimate Realm Lords.

This is also the worst of times for the weak, and often a battle of the strong can turn them into ashes.

And for the Terrans, nature is the best of times.

Another period of time passed, Ye Tian completely stabilized the realm, and then separated an ultimate particle clone, crossed the ultimate void, and went to visit the Doomsday Extreme Venerable.
